description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the files /.gitlab-ci.d/container-core.yml and /.gitlab-ci.d/container-cross.yml. Define a .container_job_template (provided by the includes) and create jobs that extend it for each target: amd64-alpine-container (default stage), amd64-debian-container (stage containers), amd64-fedora-rust-nightly-container (allow_failure true), amd64-opensuse-leap-container, amd64-ubuntu2204-container, and python-container. Each job sets the variable NAME to the respective OS (alpine, debian, fedora-rust-nightly, opensuse-leap, ubuntu2204, python) and runs the script from the template to build the container image. The debian job runs in the containers stage, while the others use the default stage. The fedora-rust-nightly job is allowed to fail without breaking the pipeline.
